mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_content (work_name, about, space_no, space_name, uploader, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{workName}, #{about}, #{spaceNo}, #{spaceName}, #{uploader}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE work_content SET work_name = #{workName}, about = #{about}, space_no = #{spaceNo}, space_name = #{spaceName}, uploader = #{uploader}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

update work_content set deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM work_content
AND space_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.spaceNo}, '%')
AND space_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.spaceName}, '%')
AND work_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.workName}, '%')
AND deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_content
AND space_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.spaceNo}, '%')
AND space_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.spaceName}, '%')
AND work_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.workName})
AND deleted_at IS NULL
